passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 1-5): In the following questions, the symbol вҠҷ, О”, вҠ— and @ are used with the following meanings: P вҠҷ Q means P is greater than Q. P О” Q means P is either greater than or equal to Q. P = Q means P is equal to Q. P вҠ— Q means P is smaller than Q. P @ Q means P is either smaller than or equal to Q. Now, in each of the following questions assuming the given statements be true, find which of the two conclusions I and II given below them are definitely true. Give answer 1) if only conclusion I is true; 2) if only conclusion II is true; 3) if either I or II is true; 4) if neither I nor II is true; and 5) if both I and II are true.

solutions.solution:
Statements: A вҠҷ N, J @ U, S вҠ— A, J = N Conclusions: I. J @ S     II. U вҠ— N

Solution:
We first decode entire questionnaire. We have
О”вҶ’ вүҘ, вҠҷвҶ’ >, =вҶ’ =, @вҶ’ вүӨ, вҠ—вҶ’ <

Statements: I. J < S
Conclusions: I. J < U, A, T > U, G вүҘ A
Statements: I. I вүҘ U
Conclusions: I. A = M
Statements: N > A, H, C, A = H, N @ D
Conclusions: I. D вүҘ N
Statements: I. D вүҘ N
Conclusions: N > A, R @ T, M @ A
Conclusions: I. M < N, T @ N, A = Y, I вүҘ A, T
Conclusions: I. I = Y

Part of the steps:

1. (i) Conclusion I: Given conclusion A < S. Relevant statements J = N and A вҠҷ N, J @ U, Combining A Г— J and J < U which is true.
   (ii) Conclusion II: < U. Relevant statements are J = U and J = N. Combining J < U by check A Г— N it can be true because A is not equal to any term in the given statements. (Note that by virtue of

2. (i) Conclusion I: O вүҘ M. Not given statements. [Note that by virtue of conclusion it is true in doing step III, etc.]
   (ii) Conclusion II: O вүӨ F. Relevant statements are: G вүҘ A, U < A. (Combining step of O вүҘ F which towards common term is A in G вүҘ A and U < A) by check вҲҖ G вүҘ A вүҘ U which gives way from H вүҘ R (i.e. A). Combining, we have G вүҘ A вүҘ U which gives G > U, So, it follows.

Correct answer: 2

3. (i) Conclusion I: P = N.
   (ii) Conclusion II: D > N. So follow from N вүӨ D which is already given.
   By check S, either of them
   Correct answer: 4

4. (i) Given: I. M < T. Relevant statements are: M вүӨ A, N > A. Combining step: M вүӨ A < N. So, conclusion I follows.
   (ii) Conclusion I: 7 вүҘ N. Not possible because T is not equal to any other term in the four given statements (by virtue of Tip 7).
   
Correct answer: 1
